The College of New Jersey, BFA, Interactive Mulitmedia '26

Daniel
DeLeon

Aspiring design engineer exploring the intersection of technology and art while crafting accessable interfaces.

Archive frame / 01
Prototype still / 02

About

02 / Profile

I've always been fascinated by how computers work, so when I discovered that machines could help humans create art and design, it felt like I truly found my passion. That curiosity turned into a career for designing things that don't just look good but actually impact the businesses behind them. I'm a multi-disciplinary designer who thinks in systems, whether that's building a brand identity, crafting a UI, or animating something that makes people stop scrolling. Outside of work, I'm probably grinding through a Soulsborne game or an RPG. Currently on NG+3 on Elden Ring and working through Dark Souls 3, because I love dark-fantasy type games right now.

Work

01
NetElixir

Content Designer Intern

View Experience

Designed and built landing pages, brand campaign visuals, and LinkedIn content for LXRInsights, NetElixir's AI-powered marketing platform. Collaborated directly with the product manager and founder on creative direction, UX decisions, and campaign strategy.

02
Mitzvah Circle

Social Media Managment Intern

View Experience

Brand and content design for a nonprofit organization. Delivered a full suite of visual assets including social campaigns, impact infographics, and donor-facing presentations that simplified complex program messaging and supported fundraising efforts.

03
The Sanctuary

Digital Marketing Intern

View Experience

Content and social design for a boutique medical spa. Created and scheduled platform-specific posts using Adobe Creative Suite, pitched original content concepts to leadership, and used audience analytics to shape ongoing content strategy.

Passion
Projects

A collection of personal work spanning branding, visual design, and digital art — projects driven by curiosity, craft, and the desire to push creative boundaries outside of client work.
